title: palhinhaea torta
intro: Palhinhaea torta, also known as the Torta Palhinhaea or Rock Cap, is a species of liverwort, a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the division Marchantiophyta. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Palhinhaea torta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in poultices and topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
